title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Metro Shoes

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Metro Shoes
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
